examples.prompt: I want an agent for books.toscrape.com category pages

example.summary:
Done! The agent for **books.toscrape.com** category pages is fully configured and preview ran successfully. Here's a summary of what was set up:

- **Browsing**: Navigates to category pages using a URL template with `category_slug` and `category_id` as inputs (e.g., `mystery` / `3`)
- **Parsing**: Extracts book data — `name`, `price`, `url`, and `availability` — from each listing on the category page

parameters.name: managed_by

schema.description: Filter by who manage the agent

parameters.description: Filter by who manage the agent

examples.name: aldi_clp
examples.description: The Aldi Browse Products agent extracts structured product listings from Aldi’s category pages. This agent is ideal for monitoring category-level assortment, analyzing competitive inventory, and powering product discovery and pricing intelligence use cases

examples.name: aldi_pdp
examples.description: The Aldi Product Detail Page Agent extracts structured data from individual product pages on Aldi. This agent is ideal for tracking competitor pricing, monitoring catalog changes, and powering product intelligence use cases.

examples.name: amazon_plp
examples.description: The Amazon Browse Products agent extracts structured product listings from Amazon’s category pages. This agent is ideal for monitoring category-level assortment, analyzing competitive inventory, and powering product discovery and pricing intelligence use cases

examples.name: amazon_pdp
examples.description: The Amazon Product Detail Page Agent extracts structured data from individual product pages on Amazon. This agent is ideal for tracking competitor pricing, monitoring catalog changes, and powering product intelligence use cases.

examples.name: amazon_pdp
examples.description: The Amazon Product Detail Page Agent extracts structured data from individual product pages on Amazon. This agent is ideal for tracking competitor pricing, monitoring catalog changes, and powering product intelligence use cases.

manufacturer.description: The company that manufactured the product

product_url.description: The direct Amazon URL of the product

pack_size.description: The packaging or pack size information (e.g., 12-pack, 500ml)

web_price.description: The current selling price of the product in USD

product_detail_column_and_information_wi.description: Tabular details about the product such as specifications or attributes

product_availability_and_delivery_terms.description: Shipping terms, delivery times, or availability details

unit_of_measure_quantity.description: Numeric quantity of the product in the specified unit of measure

selection_for_type_of_item_field.description: Primary selection option field label (e.g., Size, Color)

secondary_selection_for_type_of_item_fie.description: Secondary selection option field label (if applicable)
The selected value for the secondary selection field

list_price.description: The original price (before discounts) of the product in USD

image_url.description: The URL of the product's main image

brand.description: The brand name of the product

number_of_reviews.description: The total number of customer reviews for the product

best_sellers_category_2_name.description: The name of the secondary Best Seller category

best_sellers_category_2_rank.description: The Best Seller rank of the product within the secondary category

climate_pledge_friendly.description: Indicates if the product is part of Amazon's Climate Pledge Friendly program

warning.description: Product warnings (e.g., choking hazard, safety notes)

special_feature.description: Unique feature or benefit of the product

variants.description: ASINs of related or variant products (e.g., other colors or sizes)

brief_product_description.description: Bullet-point features or highlights of the product

recommended_uses.description: Suggested uses or scenarios for the product

country_of_origin.description: Country where the product was manufactured

asin.description: Amazon Standard Identification Number (ASIN) of the product

top_reviews.description: Top reviews for the product (typically the most helpful or recent ones)

technical_details.description: Technical specifications or details of the product

brand_story_background.description: URL of the background image behind the brand logo

brand_store.description: URL of the brand's Amazon store page

bought_in_past_month.description: Recent sales trends, e.g., number of units bought in the past month

frequently_bought_with.description: Items that are commonly purchased alongside this product

4_stars_and_above.description: Similar products with ratings of 4 stars or higher

related_products.description: Other products related to this item

alternate_products_for_top_3_alternates.description: Details about substitute products for top 3 alternates

feature_value.description: Value corresponding to the generic product feature

UNSPSC.description: The UNSPSC classification code for the product

option_name.description: The name of a selectable product option

similar_item.description: A product identified as similar to this one

delivery_time_estimate.description: Estimated delivery time for the product

variations.description: Different variations of the product (size, color, etc.)

Parser.description: Custom extraction recipe defining what data to extract and how to structure it. Each property represents a field in the output.

oneOf.description: Terminal parser - extract a single value
Terminal list parser - extract multiple values
Schema list parser - extract list of objects

render_type.description: Type of render completion to wait for

ExtractPayload.description: Request body model for the /extract endpoint

AgentPayload.title: AgentPayload

params.description: The agent's input parameters, for example query, prodcut_id, etc. Depands on the agent used.

localization.description: Controls if localization sould be enabled (default false). Some agent support localization based on zip_code or store_id on the site it self. Relevant only when agent is supporting localization

formats.description: Output formats to include in the response alongside `data.parsing`. By default, only structured parsed data is returned.

AgentPayload.description: Request body model for the /agent/run endpoint

AgentBatchInputsPayload.title: AgentBatchInputsPayload

params.description: The agent's input parameters, for example query, prodcut_id, etc. Depands on the agent used.

localization.description: Controls if localization sould be enabled (default false). Some agent support localization based on zip_code or store_id on the site it self. Relevant only when agent is supporting localization

formats.description: Output formats to include in the response alongside `data.parsing`. By default, only structured parsed data is returned.

AgentBatchInputsPayload.description: Request body model for the /agent/run endpoint

AgentAsyncPayload.title: AgentPayload

params.description: The agent's input parameters, for example query, prodcut_id, etc. Depands on the agent used.

localization.description: Controls if localization sould be enabled (default false). Some agent support localization based on zip_code or store_id on the site it self. Relevant only when agent is supporting localization

formats.description: Output formats to include in the response alongside `data.parsing`. By default, only structured parsed data is returned.

AgentAsyncPayload.description: Request body model for the /agent/run endpoint

AgentParams.description: Agent input parameters. At least one agent-specific key-value pair is required (e.g., `keyword`, `product_id`). Refer to the specific agent's documentation.

country.description: Country used to access the target URL, use ISO Alpha-2 Codes

locale.description: Language preference for the search results. Use LCID standard

parse.description: Whether to parse the response content

SerpPayload.title: SerpPayload

query.description: The search query string. Required for google_search, google_news, google_images, and google_maps_search

place_id.description: Google Maps place identifier. Required for google_maps_place and google_maps_reviews

latitude.description: Google Maps place identifier. Required for google_maps_place and google_maps_reviews

time.description: Filter results by time range. Only supported for google_search, google_news, and google_images

country.description: Run the search as if from a specific country. Returns geo-localized results (optimized for US)

locale.description: Language preference for the search results. Use LCID standard

location.description: Location context for the search. Accepted for google_search, google_news, and google_images — not supported for Maps engines. Pass a location string (e.g. "United States", "New York, NY") or a raw Google UULE value.

no_html.description: When set to true, removes the html_content field from the response

start.description: Result offset for fetching beyond the first batch.

include_pages_html.description: When set to true, returns raw HTML per individual result page instead of a single stitched HTML string.

ads_optimization.description: When set to true, boosts sponsored results using incognito rendering (requires JS).

SerpPayload.description: Request body model for the fast serp endpoint

FastSerpPayload.title: FastSerpPayload

query.description: The search query string. Required for google_search, google_news, google_images, and google_maps_search

place_id.description: Google Maps place identifier. Required for google_maps_place and google_maps_reviews

latitude.description: Google Maps place identifier. Required for google_maps_place and google_maps_reviews

time.description: Filter results by time range. Only supported for google_search, google_news, and google_images

country.description: Run the search as if from a specific country. Returns geo-localized results (optimized for US)

locale.description: Language preference for the search results. Use LCID standard

location.description: Location context for the search. Accepted for google_search, google_news, and google_images — not supported for Maps engines. Pass a location string (e.g. "United States", "New York, NY") or a raw Google UULE value.

no_html.description: When set to true, removes the html_content field from the response

FastSerpPayload.description: Request body model for the fast serp endpoint

SerpResponse.title: SerpResponse
SerpResponse.description: Response from the Fast SERP realtime API. All engines share the same top-level envelope; entity types under parsing.entities vary by search_engine.

query_time.description: ISO timestamp of when the query ran

status_code.description: HTTP status code from the upstream source

url.description: The upstream URL that was queried

input_url.description: The original input URL before any redirects

html_content.description: Raw HTML of the response page. Omitted when no_html is true.

driver.description: Internal routing driver used for this request

parsing.description: Structured parsing output. Entity types under entities vary by search_engine.

nimble_links.description: Pagination links as ready-to-use Nimble API URLs (Maps engines)

next_page.description: URL to fetch the next page of results

nimble_payload.description: Next-page parameters as a structured object (web search engines)

output_format.title: ParsingType
output_format.description: Output format: plain_text, markdown, or simplified_html

max_results.title: Num Results
max_results.description: Maximum number of results to return. Actual count may be lower depending on availability

content_type.description: Filter by content type (only supported with focus=general). Supports semantic groups ('documents', 'spreadsheets', 'presentations') and specific formats ('pdf', 'docx', 'xlsx', etc.)

search_depth.title: Search Depth
search_depth.description: Controls content richness and latency. `lite` = metadata only (title, snippet, URL), `fast` = rich content (~2K chars), `deep` = full page scraping

include_answer.title: Include Answer
include_answer.description: Generate an LLM-powered answer summary based on search result snippets

exclude_domains.title: Exclude Domains
exclude_domains.description: List of domains to exclude from search results. Maximum 50 domains

include_domains.title: Include Domains
include_domains.description: List of domains to include in search results. Maximum 50 domains

start_date.title: Start Date
start_date.description: Filter results after this date (format: YYYY-MM-DD or YYYY)

end_date.title: End Date
end_date.description: Filter results before this date (format: YYYY-MM-DD or YYYY)

time_range.title: TimeRange
time_range.description: Filter by recency: hour, day, week, month, or year. Cannot be combined with start_date/end_date

max_subagents.title: Max Subagents
max_subagents.description: Maximum number of subagents to execute in parallel for WSA focus modes (shopping, social, geo). Ignored for SERP focus modes

SearchPayload.title: SearchPayload
SearchPayload.description: Request body model for the /search endpoint

sitemap.description: Sitemap and other methods will be used together to find URLs

crawl_entire_domain.description: Allows the crawler to follow internal links to sibling or parent URLs, not just child paths

limit.description: Maximum number of pages to crawl

max_discovery_depth.description: Maximum depth to crawl based on discovery order

exclude_paths.description: URL pathname regex patterns that exclude matching URLs from the crawl

include_paths.description: URL pathname regex patterns that include matching URLs in the crawl

ignore_query_parameters.description: Do not re-scrape the same path with different (or none) query parameters

allow_external_links.description: Allows the crawler to follow links to external websites

allow_subdomains.description: Allows the crawler to follow links to subdomains of the main domain

callback.description: Webhook configuration for receiving crawl results

url.description: Webhook URL to receive crawl results

headers.description: Headers to send to the webhook URL

metadata.description: Custom metadata that will be included in all webhook payloads for this crawl

events.description: Type of events that should be sent to the webhook URL. (default: all)

sitemap.description: Sitemap and other methods will be used together to find URLs

country.description: Country used to access the target URL, use ISO Alpha-2 Codes

locale.description: LCID standard locale used for the URL request. Alternatively, user can use 'auto' for automatic locale based on geo-location

domain_filter.description: Includes subdomains of the main domain in the mapping process

limit.description: Maximum number of links to return

MapPayload.title: MapPayload
MapPayload.description: Request body model for the /map endpoint

url.description: URL of the media file to download

country.description: Country used to access the target URL, use ISO Alpha-2 Codes

locale.description: LCID standard locale used for the URL request. Alternatively, user can use 'auto' for automatic locale based on geo-location

expected_mime_types.description: Allowed MIME types (supports wildcards like image/*)

MediaAsyncOptions.description: Cloud storage configuration. Only S3 is currently supported.

agent.description: The input agent name (present when agent query param was used)

antibots.description: List of detected antibots for the domain

need_to_render.description: Whether the page needs to be rendered to be properly resolved.

url.description: The input URL (present when url query param was used)

storage_type.description: Storage type for async results. Use s3 for Amazon S3 and gs for Google Cloud Platform.

storage_url.description: Repository URL where output will be saved. Format: s3://Your.Bucket.Name/your/object/name/prefix/ - Output will be saved as TASK_ID.json

callback_url.description: A URL to callback once the data is delivered. The API will send a POST request with task details (without the requested data) when the task completes.

storage_compress.description: When set to true, the response saved to storage_url will be compressed using GZIP format. If false or not set, response will be saved uncompressed.

storage_object_name.description: Custom name for the stored object instead of the default task ID

task_id.description: Unique identifier for the extraction task

status_code.description: HTTP status code from the target website

html.description: Raw HTML content of the page

headers.description: Response headers from the target website

parsing.description: Parsed data when parsing is enabled

markdown.description: Markdown content when markdown conversion is enabled

cookies.description: Cookies when cookie capture is enabled

fetch_request.description: Captured executed fetch requests when enabled

screenshot.description: Base64 encoded screenshot when enabled (requires rendering)

query_time.description: Timestamp when the query was executed

driver.description: Driver used for extraction (depends on target domain and rendering configuration)

task_id.description: Unique identifier for the extraction task

status_code.description: HTTP status code from the target website

html.description: Raw HTML content of the page

headers.description: Response headers from the target website

parsing.description: Parsed data when parsing is enabled

markdown.description: Markdown content when markdown conversion is enabled

cookies.description: Cookies when cookie capture is enabled

fetch_request.description: Captured executed fetch requests when enabled

screenshot.description: Base64 encoded screenshot when enabled (requires rendering)

query_time.description: Timestamp when the query was executed

driver.description: Driver used for extraction (depends on target domain and rendering configuration)

answer.title: Answer
answer.description: AI-generated summary answer to your search query (only available when include_answer parameter is enabled). Returns null if disabled or if generation fails.
examples: The best web scraping tools in 2024 include...

total_results.title: Total Results
total_results.description: Total number of search results returned in this response

title.title: Title
title.description: Page title from the search result

description.title: Description
description.description: Meta description or snippet preview from the search result
examples: Comprehensive guide to the best web scraping tools...

url.title: Url
url.description: Full URL of the search result page

content.title: Content
content.description: Full extracted page content. Populated only when search_depth='deep'
examples: Full parsed content from the page...

extra_fields.title: Extra Fields
extra_fields.description: Additional metadata extracted from the page (e.g., published date, author, tags). Content varies by page structure and availability.

items.title: SearchResultModel
items.description: Individual search result containing page information. Each result includes title, description, URL, extracted content (in Deep Search mode), and optional additional metadata in extra_fields.

results.title: Results
results.description: Array of search results, each containing title, description, URL, content (in Deep Search mode), and optional metadata

request_id.title: Request Id
request_id.description: Unique identifier for tracking this search request

SearchResponse.title: SearchResponse
SearchResponse.description: Search API response containing search results with titles, descriptions, URLs, and content

examples.answer: The top web scraping tools in 2024 include...

results.title: Top 10 Web Scraping Tools for 2024
results.description: Comprehensive guide to the best web scraping tools...
results.content: Full parsed content from the page...

results.title: Web Scraping Tools Comparison
results.content: Full parsed content from the page...

task_id.description: Unique identifier for the map task

success.description: Indicates if the map request was successful

links.description: Array of mapped links with optional titles and descriptions

examples.title: Example Page 1
examples.description: This is an example description for page 1

msg.description: Error message indicating the payment issue
Validation error message describing what went wrong

message.example: can't download the query response - please try again
examples: can't download the query response - please try again
